ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "total_weekly_hours_worked" REAL /* Estimated total weekly hours worked in thousands */,
  "percentage_of_working_hrs_lost" REAL /* Percentage of working hours lost */,
  "percent_hours_lost_40hrs_per_week" REAL /* Percentage of hours lost assuming 40 hours/week */,
  "percent_hours_lost_48hrs_per_week" REAL /* Percentage of hours lost assuming 48 hours/week */,
  "labour_dependency_ratio" REAL /* Labour dependency ratio */,
  "employed_female_25+_2019" REAL /* Number of employed females aged 25+ in 2019 */,
  "employed_male_25+_2019" REAL /* Number of employed males aged 25+ in 2019 */,
  "ratio_of_weekly_hours_worked_by_population_age_15-64" REAL /* Ratio of weekly hours worked by population aged 15-64 */,
  "developing_country" INTEGER /* Developing country status (1 = developing, 0 = developed) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region within the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "gini_index" REAL /* Gini index, a measure of income inequality */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population */,
  "public_debt" REAL /* Public debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the indicator was measured */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data (e.g., World Bank, IMF) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator (e.g., USD, percentage) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the economic indicator was last updated */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
